text: Which of the listed requirements do not corresponds to present regulation the life raft shall have:

options.text: Manually controlled lamp visible of at least two miles fitted at the top of the canopy
All entrances fitted with rigid boarding ramps for boarding the life raft
Floor preventing the ingress of water
Manually controlled lamp fitted inside the liferaft

explanation: Rigid boarding ramps are not a universal requirement for all liferafts; however, they must be designed for safe entry, and internal/external lights are standard safety features.
